query:
SELECT ff.id, ff.code, ff.name, ff.fieldType, ff.optionsSource, ff.dependsOnField, ff.filterByField, fs.name as sectionName, rt.name as requestTypeName
FROM formFields ff
LEFT JOIN formSections fs ON ff.sectionId = fs.id
LEFT JOIN requestTypes rt ON fs.requestTypeId = rt.id
WHERE ff.optionsSource IN ('countries', 'cities', 'sites', 'zones', 'areas', 'regions')
ORDER BY rt.name, fs.displayOrder, ff.displayOrder
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user BsRQq1X2Mh9kZmK.6749932367bb --database WqXabcMRQ5aEFJ4QyeefuN --execute SELECT ff.id, ff.code, ff.name, ff.fieldType, ff.optionsSource, ff.dependsOnField, ff.filterByField, fs.name as sectionName, rt.name as requestTypeName
FROM formFields ff
LEFT JOIN formSections fs ON ff.sectionId = fs.id
LEFT JOIN requestTypes rt ON fs.requestTypeId = rt.id
WHERE ff.optionsSource IN ('countries', 'cities', 'sites', 'zones', 'areas', 'regions')
ORDER BY rt.name, fs.displayOrder, ff.displayOrder
